title: Status column default to customized view in the Administration
excerpt: When you customize the Status dropdown in the Administration > Customization  > Boards section, it would be great if the order of the new status match when you create a new board.  Currently, the dropdown items are liste…

posts.author: brandiethomas (Brandie Thomas)
posts.cookedHtml: When you customize the Status dropdown in the Administration > Customization > Boards section, it would be great if the order of the new status match when you create a new board. Currently, the dropdown items are listed in the default Status column, but they will not be in the same order. The only known workaround is to delete the default column and add a new Status column and then that will show the updated order. Would be nice, if this just worked with the default Status column for new boards.
